name: The World is Your Sandbox
description:
You died, you thought there would be nothing after death. But instead you were greeted by two options "New Game+" Or "SandBox Mode". You picked SandBox mode, now you find yourself returned to the world but this time no one seems to notice you or anything you do. Anything you ask anyone to do, they do it without even noticing you.

Image Unrelated.
creator: Origin73
